stan_swiata.opis: Iran announced closure of the Strait of Hormuz following continued US strikes — a major qualitative escalation threatening global oil supply and directly impacting Polish energy prices.
Ukraine continues deep strikes inside Russia; conflict ongoing on Poland's eastern border with no qualitative change this cycle.
Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17; ongoing Middle East conflict entangled with Iran situation, limited direct impact on Poland.
Zelensky still under pressure to resolve WWII army unit naming dispute with Poland; diplomatic friction continues without resolution.
